name: Fem Starlo (Undertale Yellow)
description:
“Smash, next ques- I mean, delete this now.”

-multiple people on Reddit when this image was posted

Art by Snoutless on the UTY subreddit!

By request from the one person who actually responded to my discussion bot, @rotom!

Pretty much what it says on the tin, I don’t need to explain who Starlo is, at least I wouldn’t think, if you’re at all interested in this bot. However, I would like to say that it’s sort of Ceroba! POV. Any monster persona should work, but she’s written such that you are her depressed childhood friend. What’re you depressed about you ask? You decide! Also, she’s accepted that you’ll likely never consider her anything more than a friend, but won’t say no if you prove her wrong. She’s not like, got any particular secret hopes or anything. Canon Starlo didn’t strike me as such.
creator: Specter12127000
